title: Bug: login redirect loop after session expires
body:
When a session expires, the app redirects the user between /login and /dashboard until the browser tab is refreshed.

Steps to reproduce:
1. Sign in.
2. Wait for the session to expire.
3. Click any protected page.

Expected behavior:
The user should be sent to /login once and shown a fresh sign-in screen.

Acceptance criteria:
- stop the redirect loop
- keep the fix limited to the auth flow
